name: mcam-assistant
description: Extensible manufacturing assistant for Mastercam, NC programs, setup sheets, and revisioned CNC outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Ingest Mastercam and NC files, then emit revisioned programs and setup sheets.
interface.longDescription: MCAM Assistant v0.1 extracts structured manufacturing data from Mastercam-adjacent files, parses NC operations, accepts plain-English engineering instructions, creates never-overwrite NC revisions with enriched comments, generates HTML/PDF/Excel setup sheets, and exposes a module registry for future CAM, machine, fixture, control, inventory, and report integrations.
defaultPrompt: Extract tooling and setup data from this MCAM job.
Parse this NC program into operations.
Create a revisioned NC program with setup sheets.
